text:
(In reply to Anton Kochkov from comment #50)

yes, there seems to be a mismatch of file-versions in the release again(I didn't research the issue for now)...
for a quick fix you can override this one(u-boot.bin 2020.10) to your msdods-partition:  

https://sourceforge.net/projects/freebsd-bug-id-255080/files/u-boot.bin/download
